title: Remake of Medley of YTPMV
description:
EDIT#2 (10/03/2016):
Watch A-Side of YTPMV, the rearranged version of this medley here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QQz3wF2tdFg

***

EDIT#1 (16/10/2013):
Oh my god, over 100000 views? Thank you!  =D

***

FINISHED! My contribution to the YTPMV phenomena. Or, partially, Reourom-san made the original version  ^_^;

#ytpmvmedley

Related videos (YTPMVs made out of this medley, etc.):
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLED2377273A163707
